Yin Zong ŚįĻŚģó
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Zong (ŚįĻŚģó). Son of Yin Mo, served as Academian. Yin Zong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
